'''鈭歴h-j-b-j''' ('''kashajbejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrangle|wrangle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrangle|wrangle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-j-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| kashajbejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishajbejoko|thishajbejoko]] || [[word:jishajbejoko|jishajbejoko]] || [[word:shishajbejoko|shishajbejoko]] || [[word:kishajbejoko|kishajbejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
